title: Izmaost's Floral Redstone
description: Reworks redstone to look more like floral vines. Great for decorating and for people who don't like redstone!
body:
## ⭐️Floral redstone⭐️ Izmaost's Floral redstone is a resource pack that reworks the look of redstone dust to fit a more flowery style. The stronger the strength the more flowers bloom.
## 📋 Requirements 📋 This pack does not require Optifine or any texture stitching mod to work. For any issues, questions or requests feel free to reach out on KoFi! Works best with [Cyanstone](https://modrinth.com/mod/cyanstone) with built in support for it. Not nessecary though. ## 🎨 My Creations 🎨 Here you can find resourcepacks made by me: [Izmaost's Animated Foliage](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-animated-foliage) [Izmaost's Animated Flora](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-animated-flora) [Izmaost's Floral Redstone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-floral-redstone) [Izmaost's Minimalist Redstone](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-minimalistic-redstone) [Izmaost's Modern Kitchen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-modern-kitchen) [Izmaost's Glazed Terracotta](https://modrinth.com/project/izmaosts-glazed-terracotta) [Izmaost's Softer Weather](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-softer-weather) [Izmaost's Autumnal Birch](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/izmaosts-autumnal-birch)
